description: Cannot reliably test 'merge=union conflict file routes to predictedTier=auto-resolve' because git merge-tree --write-tree applies union driver from working-tree .gitattributes during the tree merge, so the file resolves cleanly and never appears in conflict output.
resolution: Assert wouldRequireAgent === false and accept either predictedTier in {clean-merge, auto-resolve}. The auto-resolve code path is still defensively retained for cases where merge-tree surfaces a union file (e.g. core.attributesFile config diverging from working tree).
